package.name: pick_and_place_demo
package.description: Hardcoded 11-step pick-and-place for one vial in the HPLC autosampler cell. Mixes named SRDF states (arm home, gripper open/closed) with Cartesian pose targets (above-pick / grasp / above-drop / release) and bench/rack/tray/wall collision objects. Implements checklist item 21 (autosampler tie-in).
